titleStmt.title: SII 18.176: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 176. (B.K. No. 176 of 1933-34.) KAṆṆŪR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 1st year of the reign of Tribhuvanamalla Bijjāḷadēva, Pramādīcha, Śrāvaṇa śu. Pūrṇimā, Thursday. This cyclic year Pramādīcha which coincided with A.D. 1133, takes the beginning of Bijjāḷa's reign to as early a date as A.D. 1133. But we have no other evidence to corroborate this. So it is likely that Pramādīcha is a mistake for Pramōdūta which coincided with A.D. 1150. In that year the details correspond regularly to A.D. 1150, August 10, Thursday.
It states that Kundaya and others made a gift of land to god Svayambhu-Chaṇḍēśvaradēva. Mention is made of Masaṇeya-Sāhaṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Engraved in continuation of B.K. 175 of 1933-34.
div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu kaḻacu
ryya bhujabaḻacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrabijjaladēvavarṣada prathamarājyaṁ pramādī
casaṁvatsarada srāvaṇa suddha saurnamavāse vitīpāta brihaspativāradalu masaṇeyasāha
ṇi samasta praje kuṁdaya mukhyavāgi svayaṁbhu caṁḍēsvaradēvargge sarvva namasyavāgi kaṇagi
leya gaḍuviṁ baḍagalu biṭṭa mattaru 12 nivēśaṇa 12 keI I dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisa da
varge paṁcamahāpātakavasarakku .
Digital edition of SII 18.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
